description:
What: MakeTuple([v1, v2]) writes into a caller-allocated tuple-of-arity-2 struct.

CLIF impact: strict reduction per MakeTuple callsite that is destinationized.

Removes: per-call tuple alloc when destinationized.

Tests: golden CLIF on a small tuple-returning fn.
title: fz-dps.F3: DPS for MakeTuple of known arity
